suite: Validate Start time / End time / Duration fields

title: Lesson – Duration Field – "Enable Duration Field" Custom Setting ON – Field visible on lesson form
description: AC — Field Display — Confirm Duration field appears on the lesson create/edit form when the custom setting Enable Duration Field on Lesson Form is enabled.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Navigate to Lesson Management > Lesson List
steps_actions:
1. "Click Create Lesson button"
2. "Observe the Time section of the form"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson creation form opens"
2. "Duration field is visible alongside Start Time and End Time"

title: Lesson – Duration Field – Default Duration from Custom Setting – Field pre-filled on form open
description: AC — Default Value — Confirm Duration field is pre-filled with the value defined in Default Lesson Duration Minutes custom setting when the form opens.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Custom Setting Default_Lesson_Duration_Minutes__c = 60
- Navigate to Lesson Management > Lesson List
steps_actions:
1. "Click Create Lesson button"
2. "Observe the Duration field value"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson creation form opens"
2. "Duration field shows 60 (pre-filled from custom setting)"

title: Lesson – Create – All Three Fields Valid (Start + End + Duration match) – Lesson saved
description: AC — Valid Input — Lesson is successfully saved when Start Time, End Time, and Duration are all provided and consistent (Duration = End − Start).
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Select lesson date"
2. "Enter Start Time"
3. "Enter End Time"
4. "Enter Duration"
5. "Fill in all other required fields (subject, teacher, etc.)"
6. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson date is set"
2. "Start Time field shows 09:00"
3. "End Time field shows 10:00"
4. "Duration field shows 60"
5. "Required fields populated"
6. "Lesson is saved successfully; lesson appears in list with Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60 min"

title: Lesson – Create – Start Time + Duration provided – End Time auto-calculated
description: AC — Auto-calculation — When Start Time and Duration are entered, End Time is automatically calculated as Start + Duration.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
- End Time field is empty
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"
2. "Enter Duration"
3. "Observe End Time field"
4. "Click Save (with required fields filled)"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time field shows 09:00"
2. "Duration field shows 90 and End Time auto-fills to 10:30"
3. "End Time = 10:30 (Start 09:00 + Duration 90 min)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=09:00, End=10:30, Duration=90 min"

title: Lesson – Create – End Time + Duration provided – Start Time auto-calculated
description: AC — Auto-calculation — When End Time and Duration are entered, Start Time is automatically calculated as End − Duration.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
- Start Time field is empty
steps_actions:
1. "Enter End Time"
2. "Enter Duration"
3. "Observe Start Time field"
4. "Click Save (with required fields filled)"
steps_result:
1. "End Time field shows 11:00"
2. "Duration field shows 60 and Start Time auto-fills to 10:00"
3. "Start Time = 10:00 (End 11:00 − Duration 60 min)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=10:00, End=11:00, Duration=60 min"

title: Lesson – Create – Duration mismatched with Start and End – Save blocked
description: AC — Validation — Lesson cannot be saved when Duration value does not match the difference between End Time and Start Time (all 3 fields filled manually with inconsistent values).
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"
2. "Enter End Time"
3. "Manually overwrite Duration with a mismatched value"
4. "Click Save"
5. "Observe error message"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time = 09:00"
2. "End Time = 10:00"
3. "Duration field shows 90 (mismatched: 10:00 − 09:00 = 60 min, not 90)"
4. "Validation error displayed; lesson is NOT saved"
5. "Error message indicates Duration does not match Start/End difference"

title: Lesson – Create – Duration = 0 – Validation error shown
description: AC — Boundary Validation — Entering Duration = 0 must trigger a validation error as a lesson cannot have zero duration.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"
2. "Clear Duration and enter 0"
3. "Click Save"
4. "Observe the form"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time = 09:00"
2. "Duration field shows 0"
3. "Validation error displayed: Duration must be greater than 0"
4. "Lesson is NOT saved; system remains on form with error highlighted"

title: Lesson – Create – Duration = negative number – Validation error shown
description: AC — Boundary Validation — Entering a negative value in the Duration field must be rejected with a validation error.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"
2. "Enter negative value in Duration"
3. "Click Save"
4. "Observe the form"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time = 09:00"
2. "Duration field shows -30"
3. "Validation error displayed; negative duration is not allowed"
4. "Lesson is NOT saved; system remains on form with error"

title: Lesson – Create – Duration = decimal number – Validation error shown
description: AC — Input Validation — Duration field only accepts whole numbers (integers); decimal input must be rejected or not allowed.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"
2. "Enter decimal number in Duration"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time = 09:00"
2. "Field either rejects input or shows validation error"
3. "System shows validation error or does not accept decimal value; lesson is NOT saved"

title: Lesson – Create – Start time after End time – Save blocked
description: AC — Validation — Start Time must be before End Time; entering Start > End must block save with a validation error.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"
2. "Enter End Time that is earlier than Start"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time = 14:00"
2. "End Time = 10:00"
3. "Validation error: Start time must be before End time; lesson NOT saved"

title: Lesson – Create – Start time equals End time – Save blocked
description: AC — Boundary Validation — A lesson with Start Time equal to End Time (Duration = 0) must be blocked.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"
2. "Enter End Time equal to Start"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time = 10:00"
2. "End Time = 10:00"
3. "Validation error: Start and End time cannot be the same; lesson NOT saved"

title: Lesson – Create – End time exceeds midnight of lesson date – Save blocked
description: AC — Boundary Validation — Start time and End time must fall within the same calendar day (00:00–23:59) of the selected lesson date; crossing midnight must be blocked.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Create Lesson permission
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Lesson form is open, date selected
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time close to midnight"
2. "Enter Duration that would push End past midnight"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Start Time = 23:00"
2. "Duration = 90 (End would be 00:30 next day)"
3. "Validation error: Start/End time must be within the lesson date (00:00–23:59); lesson NOT saved"

title: Lesson – Duration Field – Default value from custom setting pre-fills on form open
description: AC — Custom Setting — Default Lesson Duration Minutes value is applied to Duration field when lesson form is first opened.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Custom Setting Default_Lesson_Duration_Minutes__c = 45
- Navigate to Lesson Management
steps_actions:
1. "Click Create Lesson"
2. "Observe Duration field without entering anything"
3. "Enter Start Time"
4. "Observe End Time"
steps_result:
1. "Form opens"
2. "Duration field is pre-filled with 45 from custom setting"
3. "Start Time = 09:00"
4. "End Time = 09:45"

title: Lesson – Edit – Duration entered with Start time set – End time auto-calculated
description: AC — Auto-calculation (Edit) — When editing a lesson and entering Duration while Start Time exists, End Time is auto-calculated.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- An existing lesson exists with Start Time = 09:00, End Time = 10:00, Duration = 60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open existing lesson for editing"
2. "Clear the Duration field"
3. "Re-enter a new Duration value"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Edit form opens showing Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "Duration field is empty"
3. "Duration = 90; End Time auto-updates to 10:30 (09:00 + 90 min)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=09:00, End=10:30, Duration=90"

title: Lesson – Edit – Start time changed with existing Duration – End time auto-updates
description: AC — Auto-calculation (Edit) — When Start Time is changed on an existing lesson that has a Duration, End Time should auto-update to maintain Start + Duration = End.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Change Start Time to a new value"
3. "Observe End Time"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "Start Time = 10:00"
3. "End Time auto-updates to 11:00 (10:00 + 60 min Duration)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=10:00, End=11:00, Duration=60"

title: Lesson – Edit – End time changed with existing Duration – Duration auto-updates
description: AC — Auto-calculation (Edit) — When End Time is changed manually on an existing lesson, Duration auto-updates to reflect new End − Start.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Change End Time to a new value"
3. "Observe Duration field"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "End Time = 11:00"
3. "Duration auto-updates to 120 (11:00 − 09:00)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=09:00, End=11:00, Duration=120"

title: Lesson – Edit – Duration entered with End time set – Start time auto-calculated
description: AC — Auto-calculation (Edit) — When editing a lesson, entering Duration while End Time is set and Start Time is empty causes Start Time to be auto-calculated.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: End Time = 11:00, Start Time cleared, Duration = blank
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Enter Duration"
3. "Observe Start Time field"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows End=11:00, Start is empty"
2. "Duration = 60; Start Time auto-fills to 10:00 (11:00 − 60 min)"
3. "Start Time = 10:00"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=10:00, End=11:00, Duration=60"

title: Lesson – Edit – Both Start and End times changed manually – Duration auto-updates
description: AC — Auto-calculation (Edit) — When both Start and End times are manually edited, Duration field auto-updates to reflect the new difference.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Change Start Time"
3. "Change End Time"
4. "Observe Duration field"
5. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "Start Time = 08:00"
3. "End Time = 10:30"
4. "Duration auto-updates to 150 (10:30 − 08:00)"
5. "Lesson saved with Start=08:00, End=10:30, Duration=150"

title: Lesson – Edit – Duration edited with both Start and End set – End time auto-adjusts
description: AC — Auto-calculation (Edit) — When Duration is changed while both Start and End are set, End Time auto-adjusts to Start + new Duration.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Change Duration to a new value"
3. "Observe End Time"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "Duration = 120"
3. "End Time auto-adjusts to 11:00 (09:00 + 120 min)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=09:00, End=11:00, Duration=120"

title: Lesson – Edit – Duration cleared with Start time set – End time cleared
description: AC — Field Interaction — When Duration is cleared while Start Time is set (End Time was auto-calculated), End Time field clears.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, Duration=60, End=10:00 (auto-calc)
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Clear the Duration field"
3. "Observe End Time field"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "Duration field is empty"
3. "End Time field is cleared/empty"
4. "System prompts for End Time or shows validation that End Time is required"

title: Lesson – Edit – Duration cleared with End time set – Start time cleared
description: AC — Field Interaction — When Duration is cleared while End Time is set (Start Time was auto-calculated), Start Time field clears.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: End=11:00, Duration=60, Start=10:00 (auto-calc)
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Clear the Duration field"
3. "Observe Start Time field"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=10:00, End=11:00, Duration=60"
2. "Duration field is empty"
3. "Start Time field is cleared/empty"
4. "System prompts for Start Time or shows validation error"

title: Lesson – Edit – Duration cleared with both Start and End set – Times remain Duration blank
description: AC — Field Interaction — When Duration is cleared while both Start and End are manually set, both time fields remain unchanged and Duration stays blank.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60 (both manually set)
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Clear the Duration field"
3. "Observe Start and End Time fields"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "Duration is empty"
3. "Start=09:00 and End=10:00 remain unchanged"
4. "Lesson saves with Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration blank"

title: Lesson – Edit – Duration cleared and new Duration entered with Start and End set – End auto-adjusts
description: AC — Field Interaction — After clearing Duration and entering a new value with both Start and End set, End Time auto-adjusts to Start + new Duration.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration blank (was cleared)
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing with blank Duration"
2. "Enter a new Duration value"
3. "Observe End Time"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration is blank"
2. "Duration = 45"
3. "End Time auto-adjusts to 09:45 (09:00 + 45 min)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=09:00, End=09:45, Duration=45"

title: Lesson – Edit – Auto-adjust End Time when Duration matches defined value with manual Start/End
description: AC — Auto-adjustment — When user changes Duration to a new value on an existing lesson, End Time auto-adjusts to maintain consistency.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- Existing lesson: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson for editing"
2. "Change Duration to new value"
3. "Observe End Time"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Form shows Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60"
2. "Duration = 30"
3. "End Time auto-adjusts to 09:30 (09:00 + 30 min)"
4. "Lesson saved with Start=09:00, End=09:30, Duration=30"

title: Lesson – Edit Recurring – Only this lesson – Only current occurrence updated
description: AC — Recurring Edit — When editing a recurring lesson time and choosing Only this lesson, only the selected occurrence is updated.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- A recurring lesson series exists (5 occurrences: L1, L2, L3, L4, L5)
- All lessons have Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson L3 (3rd occurrence) for editing"
2. "Change Start Time"
3. "Observe Duration and End Time"
4. "Click Save"
5. "Select Only this lesson"
6. "Confirm save"
7. "Open L2 and L4 to verify"
steps_result:
1. "Edit form opens for L3"
2. "Start Time = 10:00"
3. "Duration = 60; End Time auto-updates to 11:00"
4. "Recurring scope selector appears (Only this / This and following / All)"
5. "Scope Only this selected"
6. "L3 saved with Start=10:00, End=11:00"
7. "L2 and L4 still have Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60 (unchanged)"

title: Lesson – Edit Recurring – This and following – All subsequent lessons updated
description: AC — Recurring Edit — When editing a recurring lesson time and choosing This and following, the selected lesson and all subsequent occurrences are updated.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- A recurring lesson series exists (5 occurrences: L1, L2, L3, L4, L5)
- All lessons have Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson L3 for editing"
2. "Change Start Time"
3. "Observe Duration and End Time"
4. "Click Save"
5. "Select This and following"
6. "Confirm save"
7. "Open L1 and L2 to verify"
steps_result:
1. "Edit form opens for L3"
2. "Start Time = 10:00"
3. "Duration = 60; End Time = 11:00"
4. "Recurring scope selector appears"
5. "Scope selected"
6. "L3, L4, L5 saved with Start=10:00, End=11:00, Duration=60"
7. "L1 and L2 still have Start=09:00, End=10:00 (unchanged)"

title: Lesson – Edit Recurring – Duration mismatch on recurring lesson – Save blocked
description: AC — Recurring Edit Validation — Editing a recurring lesson with a mismatched Duration should trigger a validation error regardless of scope chosen.
preconditions:
- Admin is logged in with Edit Lesson permission
- A recurring lesson exists: Start=09:00, End=10:00, Duration=60
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
steps_actions:
1. "Open recurring lesson for editing"
2. "Manually set Start Time"
3. "Manually set End Time"
4. "Manually overwrite Duration with mismatched value"
5. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Edit form opens"
2. "Start Time = 09:00"
3. "End Time = 10:00"
4. "Duration = 90 (mismatch: 10:00 − 09:00 = 60)"
5. "Validation error: Duration does not match Start/End difference; lesson NOT saved"

title: Calendar – Duration Field – Enable Duration Field Custom Setting ON – Field visible on lesson form
description: AC — Field Display — Confirm Duration field appears on the lesson create/edit form when accessed from the Calendar view (SF or BO) and custom setting is enabled.
preconditions:

- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Navigate to Calendar (SF or BO)
steps_actions:
1. "Click on a time slot or Create Lesson on the Calendar"
2. "Observe the Time section of the form"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson creation form opens"
2. "Duration field is visible alongside Start Time and End Time"

title: Calendar – Duration Field – Default Duration from Custom Setting – Field pre-filled on form open
description: AC — Default Value — Duration field is pre-filled with Default Lesson Duration Minutes value when lesson form is opened from Calendar.

- Admin is logged in
- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled
- Custom Setting Default_Lesson_Duration_Minutes__c = 60

steps_actions:

title: Calendar – Create – All Three Fields Valid (Start + End + Duration match) – Lesson saved
description: AC — Valid Input — Lesson created from Calendar is saved when all three time fields are consistent.
preconditions:

- Custom Setting Enable_Duration_Field_on_Lesson_Form__c = Enabled

4. "Enter Duration"

steps_result:

5. "Lesson saved; appears on Calendar at 09:00–10:00"

title: Calendar – Create – Start Time + Duration provided – End Time auto-calculated

description: AC — Auto-calculation — When creating from Calendar with End Time and Duration, Start Time auto-calculates.

- Calendar view is open

1. "Open lesson creation form from Calendar"

steps_actions:

- Lesson form open from Calendar
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Start Time"

steps_actions:
